creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
audio/ogg2mp3 has a new upstream maintainer - this means wxs@ has no longer to host the distfile
	for ogg2mp3 (this is why he is cc'd - many thanks for stepping in!).

	- Add reference to new project home
	- Update port to latest version (0.6.1)
	- Make port honor LOCALBASE
